Field.name: diffuse_color_R
Field.Description: The red component of the color.

Field.name: diffuse_color_G
Field.Description: The green component of the color.

Field.name: diffuse_color_B
Field.Description: The blue component of the color.

Field.name: diffuse_color_A
Field.Description: The alpha component of the color.

Field.name: specular_color_R
Field.Description: The red component of the color.

Field.name: specular_color_G
Field.Description: The green component of the color.

Field.name: specular_color_B
Field.Description: The blue component of the color.

Field.name: specular_color_A
Field.Description: The alpha component of the color.
